testcase.name: test_list_portfolios_returns_200
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_export_portfolio_analytics.py:50: in test_list_portfolios_returns_200 assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_export_portfolio_analytics.py:58: in test_list_portfolios_returns_data assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
